title: Make quality gates enforce, not just warn (REQ-H1)
description: review-hook.mjs installs as a POST-commit hook whose exit code cannot block a commit, and only ever warns. Move the enforcing check to a mechanism that CAN gate: a pre-commit/pre-push hook and/or a required CI check (ties to H-001). Do not claim a post-commit hook blocks a commit. pattern-hunt.mjs generic path (~L776 TODO) must emit a REAL detector or no test — never an always-passing one. alignment-monitor.mjs score from real signals, not magic numbers. schema-validator.mjs must fail CLOSED when Ajv is absent (currently returns valid:true). Spec: REQ-H1.
